prompt:
You are shown one page from a SEC 10-K filing rendered as an image.
Item "15. Exhibits, Financial Statement Schedules" ENDS on this page; the next section is "Item 16. Form 10-K Summary".
First locate where Item 15 stops on this page:
- If the "Item 16" heading is visible on this page, Item 15 ends on the line directly ABOVE that heading.
- Ignore ALL text below that heading; it belongs to the next section, not Item 15.
- The target section may have started on a previous page and may leave only a short carryover at the very TOP of this page.
- If the next-section heading appears near the top, the answer may be only the few lines immediately above that heading.
- Only if no later section heading appears on this page should you use the bottom of the page as Item 15's ending.
Then transcribe VERBATIM the LAST 5 lines of Item 15 right before the section ends. The answer must come only from Item 15, even if the next section occupies most of the page. Ignore running headers, page numbers, footers.
Output ONLY the transcribed text, no commentary, no quotes, no formatting.
text:
(3) Exhibits:
See Exhibit Index immediately following the signature page of this Annual Report on Form 10-K.
